titleStmt.title: SII 18.49: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 49. (B.K. No. 128 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar at the south entrance to Ārk-Killāh.

summary.p: This incomplete record refers itself to the reign of Jagadēkamalla and is dated in Śaka 958, Śrīmukha, Pushya śu. Pūrṇimā, Sunday. The cyclic year Śrīmukha coincided with Śaka 955 and in that year the tithi cited fell on December 8, A.D. 1033, which was a Saturday. In Śaka 958, the details do not work out correctly. The palaeography and the mistake in date raise a doubt regarding the genuineness of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya pritvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakulatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmajjaga
dēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhivarddhapra
varttamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbara kalyāṇada nelavīḍino
ḷopputammire . śrīmajagadēkamalladēvavijaya
rājyōdayada śakavarṣada 958 neya śrīmukhasaṁ
vatsarada puṣya sudha puṇnami [Ādi]vāra
Digital edition of SII 18.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
